_doctrine: v60ds-5 CAPTURE DOCTRINE · CLAUDE.md TOP RULE 0 §CAPTURE · operator-locked 2026-05-11 evening HKT
_purpose: Fields exempt from the >90% coverage rule because their sparsity is LEGITIMATE (domain-specific · cohort-specific · sample-size-gated). Wired-but-null fields that do NOT appear here will trip predeploy gate C13.
_review_cadence: Re-audit every 90 days · drop fields that are no longer sparse, add fields that join the doctrine.

rationale.passport_positions: Only 1/382 hit · sample wallet has rich position dump for /wallet/<addr> demo · others use default-empty intentionally · candidate for v0.2 backfill
rationale.data_quality_note: Tag for known-bad samples · most wallets clean · sparse by design
rationale.composite_per_domain.*: Per-domain composite only computed when wallet has >=N resolved in that domain · domain-sparsity inherent
rationale.brier_by_domain.Climate: Climate markets are rare on Polymarket · only 2 wallets traded enough · legitimate sparsity
rationale.brier_by_domain.AITech: AITech markets emerged late 2025 · 17/382 wallets have any · legitimate sparsity
rationale.seed_amounts.*: Only present for politics-cohort wallets seeded via _ingest/_extract_gate0a_seeds.py · cohort-membership-gated by design
rationale.hedge_cluster.cluster_id: Only 8/382 in a flagged hedge cluster · CLEAR-class wallets correctly null this field · sparsity = real signal
rationale.archetype.*: v2.2 archetype labels gated on n_resolved >= 30 + drift score thresholds · 6/382 currently qualify · legitimate sample-size gating
rationale.copy_label: Premium label only computed when copyability.score qualifies · sparsity = correct behavior
rationale.plain_english_brier.*: Tier-1 surface that requires sample-size pass · legitimate gating
rationale.backtest_90d.*: Only computed for wallets with sufficient 90-day trade history · legitimate gating
rationale.sybil_evidence: Empty list = correct null for non-clustered wallets · only wallets in multi-member cluster get evidence entries · v0.1 currently produces only 1 multi-cluster (S038)
rationale.insider_overlap: v60dy v0.1 · ONLY wallets with actual same-side-same-market winning overlap get this block (8-10 of 393 today · 2% population) · sparsity is the signal · CLEAR/no-overlap wallets correctly have NO block per CAPTURE DOCTRINE option-b honest absence. Will rise to 20-40% population once Path A counterparty data lands and v0.2 blends graph proximity into the overlap detector.

watchlist_known_violations._note: These were KNOWN wired-but-null violations · v60dx (2026-05-11 late evening HKT) shipped _ingest/strip_doctrine_violations.py + daily-moat Stage 5c to STRIP these fields when their value is None · 7 fields cleared at populator side. The strip is idempotent + only deletes None values · populated values are preserved. If a future populator starts emitting real values for these fields, the strip becomes a no-op and the doctrine continues to clear cleanly.
